# Vox Programming Language — LLM / Agent Documentation Index
> Vox is an AI-native full-stack programming language that compiles to Rust and TypeScript.
> It is designed first as a target for large language models, then for human developers.

## Agent Policy Entry Points
- [AGENTS.md](https://vox.foundation/AGENTS.md): Cross-tool policy for all coding agents (required reading)
- [GEMINI.md](https://vox.foundation/GEMINI.md): Antigravity-specific overlay
- [CLAUDE.md](https://vox.foundation/CLAUDE.md): Claude Code overlay

## Core Documentation
- [Getting Started](https://vox.foundation/tutorials/tut-getting-started.html)
- [Language Syntax Reference](https://vox.foundation/reference/ref-syntax.html)
- [CLI Reference](https://vox.foundation/reference/cli.html)
- [Environment Variables SSOT](https://vox.foundation/reference/env-vars.html)
- [Clavis (Secret Management)](https://vox.foundation/reference/clavis-ssot.html)

## Architecture Authority
- [Architecture Index](https://vox.foundation/architecture/architecture-index.html)
- [Research Index](https://vox.foundation/architecture/research-index.html)
- [Legacy Retirement Roadmap](https://vox.foundation/architecture/legacy-retirement-roadmap.html)
- [Nomenclature Migration Map](https://vox.foundation/architecture/nomenclature-migration-map.html)

## Contributor Hub
- [Contributor Hub](https://vox.foundation/contributors/contributor-hub.html)
